TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andrés_Manuel_López_Obrador, title = Andrés_Manuel_López_Obrador, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrés_Manuel_López_Obrador} }

S.FORM: Andrés Manuel López Obrador Andrés Manuel López Obrador (ryax sa 13 na byacing tay 11 squ kawas na 1953 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953 ) mrhuw Mexico ta' misuw hya' ga Andrés Manuel López Obrador, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Andrés Manuel López Obrador minkahul sa Tepetitán, Tabasco na Mexico. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1953 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Andrés Manuel López Obrador Andrés Manuel López Obrador (ryax sa 13 na byacing tay 11 squ kawas na 1953 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953 ) mrhuw Mexico ta' misuw hya' ga Andrés Manuel López Obrador, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Andrés Manuel López Obrador minkahul sa Tepetitán, Tabasco na Mexico. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1953 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: an*r*s~ɕ manuel l*pez oβra*or an*r*s~ɕ manuel l*pez oβra*or (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** ) mrħuw mexiʦ~ʨo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa an*r*s~ɕ manuel l*pez oβra*or, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral an*r*s~ɕ manuel l*pez oβra*or minkaħul s~ɕa tepetit*n, taβas~ɕʦ~ʨo na mexiʦ~ʨo. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
